3108720.name: Silent: Abandoned
3108720.description:
"Don't play with me!"

"Silent: Abandoned" is a psychological horror centered around two brothers, Michael and John, passionate vloggers who explore abandoned places. What begins as a simple quest for content soon spirals into a dark and unsettling journey.

Average Completion Time: 1 hour

About the game

They are two brothers Michael and John vloggers who love exploring abandoned places. One night, they decide to visit an infamous abandoned house. No one has ever been able to enter it not even the most popular vloggers. But that night, something unexpected happens. When they arrive, Michael steps inside and suddenly becomes trapped, while John mysteriously vanishes outside. Now, Michael must find a way to survive. Strange and sinister things begin to unfold within the house, which seems to be taken over by demonic forces.

Play as Michael, the main character, and explore a mysterious, ever-changing house in a slow-paced, atmospheric world. Experience a blend of eerily familiar and horrifyingly realistic environments as you unravel the truth and survive the terror.

Environment

The game takes place inside a desolate, abandoned house shrouded in darkness. You're completely alone… or so it seems. But something feels off. Faint whispers, distant knocks, and unsettling noises echo through the halls—none of them coming from you. Where are they coming from? And why do they feel so close?

As you explore deeper, a strange sensation creeps in—like your mind is slowly unraveling. Reality begins to twist, and the line between what's real and imagined starts to blur.

WARNING: This game contains flashing lights and visual effects that may trigger seizures in people with photosensitive epilepsy.

Key Features

  • A slow-burn walking simulator built on atmosphere and tension.

  • See through the eyes of a bodycam, capturing every shaky step and breath.

  • Take photos to document strange occurrences and gather evidence.

  • Realistic graphics pull you deeper into the unsettling environment.
3108720.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 土耳其语, 荷兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
